message:
feat(storage): Cx-first next-6 hot-path siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue tick 114-117 storage cx-first sweep with 6 more hot-path
siblings, selected from the callsite-count ranking:

1. `append_segment_with_cx(cx, pane_id, content, content_hash)` —
   5+ callsites. The ingest pipeline's hot segment-write path.
2. `record_gap_with_cx(cx, pane_id, reason)` — 5+ callsites.
   Gap-detection write path.
3. `get_panes_with_cx(cx)` — 3+ callsites (still on the bundle
   generation + diagnostic paths).
4. `get_workflow_with_cx(cx, workflow_id)` — 6+ callsites
   (workflow lookup for detection dispatch).
5. `find_incomplete_workflows_with_cx(cx)` — 6+ callsites
   (startup recovery scan).
6. `export_workflows_with_cx(cx, query)` — 4+ callsites
   (diagnostic bundles, CLI export).

All six are pre-flight-checkpoint delegates to the legacy methods,
strictly additive.

Legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Regression test `storage_tick118_hot_path_siblings_roundtrip` pins
the combined contract: seed 2 panes, then exercise all 6 cx-first
siblings — get_panes readback (len 2), append_segment readback
(pane_id matches), record_gap (clean call), upsert+get_workflow
roundtrip (id matches), find_incomplete_workflows (contains our
workflow), export_workflows (contains our workflow). Shutdown via
shutdown_with_cx.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 479/479
storage tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage now at 21/140 methods. Next batch
candidates from callsite scan: count_segments_before (4),
count_audit_actions_before (4), count_usage_metrics_before (4),
get_action_undo (4), record_usage_metric (4), purge_audit_actions_before
(3), list_active_mutes (3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
